questions.q: Researchers warned in a study trending on April 17, 2026, that which historic city may need a massive €30 billion 'super levee' to survive sea level rise by 2300?
A device recently discovered near Bali and the Lombok Strait has been identified as an undersea monitoring system belonging to which country?
Gas operators recently urged the European Commission to subsidize what specific initiative to ensure energy security?
Japan's foreign affairs minister recently criticized the White House for using unauthorized gameplay footage from which video game company in an Iran war campaign video?
Which country recently issued a bomb threat targeting four UK locations, including London, Suffolk, and Leicester?
The Ontario government faced scrutiny after purchasing a used private jet for Premier Doug Ford's use. How much did the aircraft cost?
A palliative care study highlighted on April 16, 2026, revealed that terminally ill patients commonly experience what type of dreams as they approach death?
options: Emotional dreams reuniting with lost loved ones
Dreams entirely in black and white
questions.correctText: Emotional dreams reuniting with lost loved ones

questions.q: Data revealed in mid-April 2026 showed that which company purchased 18% of all Tesla Cybertrucks sold in the US during the fourth quarter of 2025?
In April 2026, a man was arrested after walking into the headquarters of which major health insurer in Hartford, Connecticut, while carrying a backpack containing an AR-style pistol?
Drivers who fueled up at an Edmonton gas station recently found their cars undrivable after mechanics discovered their gas tanks contained what mixture?
options: High levels of sediment and rust
